name: Crawfish File Gumbo
recipeInstructions:
1. Make a roux by cooking shortening and flour together until a golden brown color is reached while stirring constantly.
2. Add onions and cook until soft.
3. Stir in crawfish fat. Cook over low heat, stirring constantly, until the shortening floats on top.
4. Add water and seasonings. Simmer for 30 minutes to about 1 hour.
5. About 25 minutes before serving, add garlic and crawfish tails. Continue simmering for an additional 25 minutes.
6. Add parsley, celery leaves, and green onion tops. Simmer for another 5 minutes.
7. Just before serving, stir in file powder if desired (about 3/4 tsp). Serve hot with steamed rice and Tabasco sauce, if desired.
